channel.title: Comments on: Avery Brewing: The Beast, Ep. 135
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: ehh cali guy 24
item.dc:creator: ehh cali guy 24
item.description:
so i just drank a coney island sword swallower. good stuff.
i dont think i can watch all the shows to find out if you guys have tried the Mississippi Mud but they sell that at trader joes and its real good. this is actually the second episode i watch and i dont want to sound rude or anything but why can't we hear more of what Pink has to say. it seem's like this guy has a lot of experience and good description of how he tastes. i'd like to hear more about that or at least have him finish his sentences cuz sometimes he is saying something and paul you cut him off. so yea. good stuff.
item.content:encoded:
so i just drank a coney island sword swallower. good stuff.

i dont think i can watch all the shows to find out if you guys have tried the Mississippi Mud but they sell that at trader joes and its real good. this is actually the second episode i watch and i dont want to sound rude or anything but why can’t we hear more of what Pink has to say. it seem’s like this guy has a lot of experience and good description of how he tastes. i’d like to hear more about that or at least have him finish his sentences cuz sometimes he is saying something and paul you cut him off. so yea. good stuff.

item.title: By: Marco
item.dc:creator: Marco
item.description:
Another great show guys! I'm not a fan of strong beers.... my IPA is 7 % and that's enough for me. If I want something strong, I'll have a Bowmore... Highland Park... The Balvenie Scotches which satisfy my pallet more that than these super beers.
Each to their own as they say.
Cheers guys... still look forward to your casts!
Marco
item.content:encoded:
Another great show guys! I’m not a fan of strong beers…. my IPA is 7 % and that’s enough for
me. If I want something strong, I’ll have a Bowmore… Highland Park… The Balvenie Scotches which satisfy my pallet more that than these super beers.

Each to their own as they say.

Cheers guys… still look forward to your casts!

Marco
